_comment: Linear falloff along +Z, ACEN select (pivot = bbox centre = (0, 0.5, 0)), xfrm.scale. Per-vert axis-factor = 1 + (k - 1)·weight(v) — verts at the falloff start (z=-0.5, weight=1) scale by full factor k, verts at the end (weight=0) don't scale. The default drag at screen pixel (1020, 560) hits xfrm.scale's gizmo handle producing a single-axis scale (typically +X for the test camera).
